name_cn:
Garden Party Hand-painted Graffiti
🇫🇷 Imported French Fjord cowhide, wax thread stitching, master craftsman hand-painted canvas. 🐎's color matching and hand-painted graffiti are superb; each bag is a work of art.
Actual photo size 36
